children.heading: Maximum amount usable for acquisition of property
children.label: a Maximum amount usable for acquisition of property
children.text: In addition to sums heretofore expended for the acquisition of property and interests therein for the park, from funds available for expenditure from the Land and Water Conservation Fund, as established under the Land and Water Conservation Fund Act of 1965, not more than a total of $8,700,000 may be expended for the acquisition of property and interests therein under sections 429b to 429b–5 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Completion of acquisition in two years
children.label: b Completion of acquisition in two years
children.text: It is the express intent of Congress that, except for property referred to in , the Secretary shall acquire property and interests therein under sections 429b to 429b–5 of this title within two complete fiscal years after .section 429b–1(b) of this titleOctober 13, 1980
